summary: Exact HEAD 56d69700700016747741657b3af580bab5991777 passes release-risk review. The release candidate adds no database or external-data migration, preserves legacy and disable-autonomous rollback paths, persists typed provider/auth/quota/permission/timeout/cancel and repair-convergence stops with recovery metadata, reuses the merged production connector and independent-review owners, and keeps PR creation, merge, waiver, deployment, publication, and material external effects under explicit human authority. Exact-head full suite 1903/1903, targeted suite 290/290, integration and production-shaped E2E 4/4, build/typecheck evidence, clean diff check, and target conformance 80 versus origin/main baseline 81 with zero new run-session-to-CLI reverse dependencies support advancement. This role verdict is not Gate or merge authorization: current pr-prepare correctly remains not ready until the active current-head reviews are closed and recorded, adjudication and validation sequencing are rebound, Gate is regenerated, current-head CI is imported, and execute merge is explicitly invoked.

inspection.summary: Inspected the strict-head release-risk request; clean Git state and origin/main diff; completed final Story and parent roadmap with staged post-PR closure; predecessor PR lineage; Architecture, canonical Spec, test plan, and execution-topology replay; the public CLI and run-session composition root; production connector and independent-review reuse; managed-worktree authority; current-head final-prepare binding; typed provider and lifecycle stops; bounded needs_changes repair and fresh review; durable Run compatibility and migration coverage; exact-head verification, full, targeted, integration, E2E, build, typecheck, conformance, review lifecycle, sequencing, and pr-prepare artifacts. No release-risk regression or authority-boundary violation was found. The remaining non-ready Gate state is expected coordination work and must remain fail closed until recorded.

judgment_delta: Initial concern: stale prior strict-head reviews and invalidated sequencing might be mistaken for a release pass -> Final judgment: this independent verdict is bound to 56d69700 and passes the release-risk role only; pr-prepare remains correctly fail closed until current reviews, adjudication, sequencing, Gate regeneration, current-head CI import, and explicit merge are completed.
